blockers.description: .claude/ is gitignored at this repo, so the new sim-color-matcher skill is project-local only. Decision pending: add a gitignore exception or move out of .claude/.

Workspace camera publisher (_ViewportCameraPublisher) follows the active main viewport — switching to wrist camera silently makes /workspace_camera_sim publish wrist content. Caveat for any future capture/recording flow.
blockers.workaround: Set active viewport to /World/workspace_camera before capturing, OR use the dedicated /wrist_camera_rgb_sim (Replicator-backed, view-stable) for wrist. Documented in CLAUDE.md.

human_actions_pending.action: Push 16 commits across so-arm101 branch to origin
human_actions_pending.context: Branch is 16 commits ahead of origin/so-arm101. User said no pushes without approval.

decisions.decision: Color-correction math uses sRGB->linear ratio applied to current diffuseColor
decisions.rationale: Multiplicative correction preserves relative lighting behavior and converges in 1-2 iterations. Direct replacement would ignore the lighting term.

decisions.decision: Picker uses no-default-radio + Apply error if unselected
decisions.rationale: Earlier silent-default-applied to wrong target caused real bugs. Forced selection eliminates that class of mistakes.

decisions.decision: Live ROS topic refresh (1.5s) for sim view in picker
decisions.rationale: Each Apply propagates immediately; user sees the change without rebuild. Eliminates the iterate-rebuild-restart loop.

decisions.decision: Use rclpy ROS-topic subscription for viewport capture, not capture_viewport_to_file
decisions.rationale: execute_python_code runs on Kit's main thread; awaiting a frame future on the same thread deadlocks. Documented in CLAUDE.md.

decisions.decision: Independent material for ext_tile (not shared with main tile)
decisions.rationale: Allows asymmetric tone (e.g. main = dark slate, ext = warm brown). User authored both colors via picker.

next_action: Begin 'fixing the motion primitive' — first investigate which primitive is broken (start with `vla_SO-ARM101/scripts/test_qs_cycle.sh` and `motion_log.sh status`/`scan` to see recent telemetry). Don't change anything until you understand which layer (tier-1 linear / tier-2 retract-pan / OMPL) is failing.
context_notes: Long scene-polish session focused on visual fidelity (lighting, materials, colors, tile geometry). Built a new sim-color-matcher skill that turned out to be the pivotal tool — went from vision-LLM color guessing (drift, disagreement) to deterministic pixel-ratio matching that converged in 1-2 iterations per surface. Discovered (the hard way) that asyncio.run_until_complete inside execute_python_code is a same-thread deadlock — required SIGKILL to recover, lost in-session pose tweaks. CLAUDE.md updated with that gotcha + ArUco ID correction (was stale 0/1/2, actually 3/2/1) + workspace camera prim-vs-topic naming clarification. Three commits land all the scene work: d3dd788 (lighting+materials), 2276e06 (ext tile + colors + calibration), 35d0eed (CLAUDE.md). Branch so-arm101 is 16 commits ahead of origin. Next session pivots from visual polish to motion behavior — user explicitly said 'fixing the motion primitive then recording data for linux from sim'.
